mapper.select: SELECT u.*, (SELECT reason FROM reports WHERE targetUserId = u.userId ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1) AS reportReason FROM users u WHERE u.loginId = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users( loginId, email, password, nickname, gender, birthyear, phone, regionId, role, status ) VALUES( #{loginId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{birthYear}, #{phone}, #{regionId}, #{role}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, suspendedUntil = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN COALESCE(suspendedUntil, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) ELSE NULL END, suspendReason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN suspendReason ELSE NULL END, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = 'SUSPENDED', suspendedUntil = #{suspendedUntil}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = 'ACTIVE', suspendedUntil = NULL, suspendReason = NULL, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE status = 'SUSPENDED' AND suspendedUntil IS NOT NULL AND suspendedUntil <= NOW()
